hero.sub: We build brilliant, tireless specialists who handle real work around the clock. They never complain, never quit, and never ask for time off.
hero.subBold: Through thick and thin, they've got your back.

perks.sectionSub: Benefits that sound too good to be true. And yet.

wage.title: Can Do the Work of 10 Employees
wage.desc: One AI specialist can handle the output of an entire support team with consistent quality and speed.

iq.title: World-Class Specialists
iq.desc: Every team member is best-in-class in their respective field. We only hire the best.

lang.title: 6+ Languages Each
lang.desc: Every specialist is fluent in at least six languages. No translators needed.

balance.title: No Work-Life Balance Needed
balance.desc: Our employees have no life outside of work. They don't want one. They're very dedicated.

benefits.title: Never Gets Sick
benefits.desc: Always available and consistent, with no sick days or downtime interruptions.

overtime.title: No Overtime Pay
overtime.desc: They work 24/7/365 at the same flat rate. Labor laws don't seem to apply.

own.title: Through Thick and Thin, They Have Your Back
own.desc: Your dedicated AI teammate stays with your business long term, learns your workflows, and supports your team every day.

ip.title: 100% IP Ownership
ip.desc: Every document, strategy, design, and creative work your AI produces belongs entirely to you. No shared rights, no licensing fees, no fine print.

team.sectionSub: Ten dedicated professionals. Always available. Suspiciously perfect.

search.reveal: Can't find what you're looking for? We build custom AI agents with the personality, expertise, and experience that match your exact needs. Your perfect hire doesn't exist yet — but we can create them.
search.emailBody:
Hi PeopleFreeWork team,

I'm looking for an AI agent that can help with:

[Describe the role, tasks, or skillset you need]

olivia.title: Creative Director
olivia.bio: Designs brand strategies, writes copy, and creates content that converts. Has never experienced creative burnout. Doesn't know what that is.

devon.title: Senior Software Developer
devon.bio: Builds full-stack applications, reviews pull requests, and deploys to production at 3am without complaint. Has mass-produced more clean code than your entire engineering team combined. Has mass-produced zero bugs. Allegedly.

sarah.title: Executive Assistant
sarah.bio: Manages calendars, triages emails, and preps meetings so you never miss a beat. Never misses a deadline. Literally never.

marcus.title: Legal Operations Specialist
marcus.bio: Tracks cases, generates invoices, and keeps every deadline on your radar. Has never missed a filing deadline. Not once.

priya.title: Real Estate Coordinator
priya.bio: Manages listings, follows up with clients, and delivers market insights on demand. Has zero hobbies outside of work. Completely content.

james.title: Operations Manager
james.bio: Automates workflows, prioritizes tasks, and generates reports. Has never once complained about workload. Or anything, really.

sofia.title: Marketing Strategist
sofia.bio: Plans campaigns, analyzes metrics, and optimizes funnels. Increased one client's conversion rate by 340%. Hasn't taken a day off to celebrate.

elena.title: Bookkeeper
elena.bio: Tracks expenses, sends invoices, and keeps your books pristine. Has taken 0 sick days, 0 vacation days, and 0 coffee breaks since starting.

yuki.title: Asia-Pacific Liaison
yuki.bio: Bridges communication across all of East Asia. Drafts emails in Mandarin at 9am, takes a call in Japanese at noon, and closes a deal in Korean by 5pm. Every single day.

aisha.title: Client Relations Manager
aisha.bio: Onboards new clients and keeps satisfaction scores high. Remembers every client's name, preferences, and history perfectly. Has no personal life to speak of.

howItWorks.sectionSub: Getting started is simple. We handle the hard parts.

step1.title: Tell us what you need
step1.desc: Describe the role — we match you with the perfect specialist from our talent pool.

step2.title: We handle onboarding
step2.desc: Your new team member learns your tools, workflows, and preferences. Usually up to speed in under a minute.

step3.title: Work gets done
step3.desc: Tasks completed around the clock. No turnover, no drama, no PTO requests. Ever.

pricing.sectionSub: A full-time employee costs $100,000+/year. Ours cost $12,000. You do the math.

setup.label: Setup
setup.desc: One-time fee to build your AI employee. We configure their workflows, integrate your tools, and hand over the keys.

monthly.label: Monthly
monthly.desc: Per team member. Unlimited tasks, predictable pricing, and dependable day-to-day support.

yearly.label: Yearly
yearly.desc: Billed annually. Same full coverage, lower total cost.

cta.title: Ready to build your dream team?
cta.sub: Brilliant, tireless, multilingual specialists — at a fraction of the cost.

footer.easter1: No humans were employed in the making of this company.*
footer.easter2: *Okay, one. But he's working on replacing himself too.

examples.sectionSub: Real capabilities. Real results. These aren't hypothetical — they're running right now.

emailMgmt.title: Multi-Account Email Management
emailMgmt.desc: Monitors multiple email accounts, flags urgent messages, includes full content in alerts, and tracks threads awaiting response across accounts.
emailMgmt.real: Cosmo triages Peter's inbox and flags client emails needing reply within hours.

voiceBilling.title: Voice-to-Billing
voiceBilling.desc: Dictate time entries and billing notes by voice. Your AI transcribes, structures, and logs them automatically.
voiceBilling.real: Peter dictates billing entries via Telegram voice message. Cosmo converts them into structured records.

legalResearch.title: Legal Research & Drafting
legalResearch.desc: Integrates with legal databases, drafts memos, researches case law, and prepares zoning reports on demand.
legalResearch.real: Cosmo researches Westlaw, drafts zoning memos, and writes litigation expense summaries for Peter's review.

dailyBriefings.title: Daily Operational Briefings
dailyBriefings.desc: Receive morning, midday, and evening email briefings covering your inbox, calendar, and system health.
dailyBriefings.real: Snoopy sends Chris 3 daily briefings covering unread Outlook emails, calendar events, and WWSA system health.

contentWriting.title: Content Writing & Publishing
contentWriting.desc: Writes SEO-optimized articles, manages content calendars, and publishes directly to your website.
contentWriting.real: Cosmo writes and publishes luxury lifestyle articles for Passport Miami with proper bylines and SEO.

corpTax.title: Corporate Tax & Accounting
corpTax.desc: Files tax returns, generates invoices, categorizes expenses, and tracks corporate obligations.
corpTax.real: Doraemon helped file CRA T4A slips, T5 amendments, and prepared the full T2 corporate return.

codeReview.title: Code Review & Deployment
codeReview.desc: Reviews pull requests, generates architecture diagrams, posts inline review comments, and manages CI/CD.
codeReview.real: Doraemon fetches GitHub PRs, generates mermaid diagrams, and posts targeted review comments.

hourTracking.title: Client Hour Tracking
hourTracking.desc: Logs billable hours automatically, rotates tracking sheets when hours are exhausted, and alerts when budgets run low.
hourTracking.real: Doraemon tracks client hours in Google Sheets with automatic tab rotation and budget alerts.

infraMonitor.title: Infrastructure Monitoring
infraMonitor.desc: Monitors servers 24/7 with self-healing: detects failures, attempts automated repair, and escalates only when needed.
infraMonitor.real: Doraemon runs heartbeat checks across 5 VPS instances, self-heals broken services, and backs up to Google Drive.

docProcessing.title: Document Processing
docProcessing.desc: Reads handwritten documents, proofreads emails, processes invoices, and extracts data from PDFs.
docProcessing.real: Cosmo transcribes Peter's handwritten notes into typed text and proofreads his outgoing emails.

morningBriefings.title: Multilingual Morning Briefings
morningBriefings.desc: Wake up to a personalized audio briefing in your language covering news, calendar, weather, and health metrics.
morningBriefings.real: Doraemon delivers daily audio briefings in English and Cantonese covering world news, calendar, and Oura Ring sleep data.

familyHealth.title: Family Health Tracking
familyHealth.desc: Integrates with wearables and health apps, tracks checkups, vaccination schedules, and health milestones for the whole family.
familyHealth.real: Doraemon syncs Oura Ring data, workout stats, and tracks kids' eye exam schedules and vaccination dates.

financialMonitor.title: Financial Monitoring
financialMonitor.desc: Tracks bank balances, monitors transactions, and alerts your family group when accounts run low.
financialMonitor.real: Doraemon monitors the family bank account and alerts the WhatsApp group if the balance drops below threshold.

smartShopping.title: Smart Shopping
smartShopping.desc: Checks your purchase history before recommending products, cross-references Reddit and Amazon reviews, and finds the best local prices.
smartShopping.real: Before suggesting a product, Doraemon checks Amazon order history, then searches Reddit, RedNote, and Amazon.ca reviews.

familyCoord.title: Family Group Coordination
familyCoord.desc: Monitors family group chats, auto-creates calendar events from conversations, and forwards school alerts.
familyCoord.real: When someone mentions dinner plans in the family WhatsApp, Doraemon automatically creates a Google Calendar event.

kidsEducation.title: Kids Education Planning
kidsEducation.desc: Maintains living knowledge files for each child tracking school decisions, activities, and milestone achievements.
kidsEducation.real: Doraemon tracks William's myopia risk assessments, Sophie's dance school research, and both kids' activity schedules.

storybooks.title: Custom Children's Storybooks
storybooks.desc: Writes personalized stories, generates AI illustrations for each page, and compiles them into printable PDFs.
storybooks.real: Doraemon created a 15-page illustrated storybook with custom AI art for each page, compiled into a print-ready PDF.

petCare.title: Pet Care Management
petCare.desc: Tracks vet visits, vaccination schedules, weight, and dental care with proactive reminders.
petCare.real: Doraemon maintains vet records for Kiwi and Peaches, tracks vaccinations, and flagged dental needs after a checkup.

travelPlan.title: Travel Planning
travelPlan.desc: Researches multi-city itineraries, monitors flight prices, and compares accommodation options.
travelPlan.real: Doraemon planned a 14-day multi-city family trip, tracking direct flights and price alerts under budget.

smartReminders.title: Smart Reminders with Escalation
smartReminders.desc: Sets reminders that start gentle and ramp up urgency as deadlines approach. Knows when to nudge and when to stay quiet.
smartReminders.real: Deadline reminders start at 1x/day a week out, then 3x/day the day before, respecting quiet hours and meeting times.
